TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: śąĎÁöĄť°ėśúõ u sakaydihan nakalabiyan sa mabilil kaku miadih tu nisulitan nu micutaday mueneng Kay acawa i tumunaw misalama tu limaky kasenusa mabahal kya lusa aku kyu mabiyalaw kinaacawa satu "hany" mahicakisu saw kyamuangic ! sakamuhantu numakucinida dunikahida u sasulitan numicutaday *u sakaydihan* mabilil cinida musalama tiyalimaky palida satu uhica kukalaluman numisu saw! talsipu tiyalusa pasakamu hantunumaku mahiny tengili haw ...ci amaaku aci inaaku sa manamuh tu sitangahay a limaky tada malakuwit tu kunysalama nuheny. sisa palatek hankaku taluma satu ciama caaypisikul nayi kulawat pacabay iditakuwan taynisatu kunipatelay nuduma acakulawat madubatu mitengil tu limaky an idaw kusisakamuwan sa caaypatubeli ~awu iyah~ satukiya balucu anmuwangic aca mahidatu kuwayway nuheni sisa madih kaku amala sitangahay alimaky **u sakaydihan** sakusaan matenges musatedep silusatu adihan sakamu satu cimakuida saan patubeli hannaku u "wawaita"
S.PHON: **** u sakajdińßan nakar~…ĺabijan sa mabir~…ĺir~…ĺ kaku miadińß tu nisur~…ĺitan nu mi ¶utadaj mu…ôn…ôŇč kaj a ¶awa i tumunaw misar~…ĺama tu r~…ĺimakj kas…ônusa mabańßar~…ĺ kja r~…ĺusa aku kju mabijar~…ĺaw kinaa ¶awa satu "ńßanj" mańßi ¶akisu saw kjamuaŇči ¶ ! sakamuńßantu numaku ¶inida dunikańßida u sasur~…ĺitan numi ¶utadaj *u sakajdińßan* mabir~…ĺir~…ĺ ¶inida musar~…ĺama tijar~…ĺimakj par~…ĺida satu uńßi ¶a kukar~…ĺar~…ĺuman numisu saw! tar~…ĺsipu tijar~…ĺusa pasakamu ńßantunumaku mańßinj t…ôŇčir~…ĺi ńßaw ... ¶i amaaku a ¶i inaaku sa manamuńß tu sitaŇčańßaj a r~…ĺimakj tada mar~…ĺakuwit tu kunjsar~…ĺama nuńß…ônj. sisa par~…ĺat…ôk ńßankaku tar~…ĺuma satu ¶iama ¶aajpisikur~…ĺ naji kur~…ĺawat pa ¶abaj iditakuwan tajnisatu kunipat…ôr~…ĺaj nuduma a ¶akur~…ĺawat madubatu mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu r~…ĺimakj an idaw kusisakamuwan sa ¶aajpatub…ôr~…ĺi ~awu ijańß~ satukija bar~…ĺu ¶u anmuwaŇči ¶ a ¶a mańßidatu kuwajwaj nuńß…ôni sisa madińß kaku amar~…ĺa sitaŇčańßaj ar~…ĺimakj **u sakajdińßan** sakusaan mat…ôŇč…ôs musat…ôd…ôp sir~…ĺusatu adińßan sakamu satu ¶imakuida saan patub…ôr~…ĺi ńßannaku u "wawaita"
S.FORM: śąĎÁöĄť°ėśúõ u sakaydihan nakalabiyan sa mabilil kaku miadih tu nisulitan nu micutaday mueneng Kay acawa i tumunaw misalama tu limaky kasenusa mabahal kya lusa aku kyu mabiyalaw kinaacawa satu "hany" mahicakisu saw kyamuangic ! sakamuhantu numakucinida dunikahida u sasulitan numicutaday *u sakaydihan* mabilil cinida musalama tiyalimaky palida satu uhica kukalaluman numisu saw! talsipu tiyalusa pasakamu hantunumaku mahiny tengili haw ...ci amaaku aci inaaku sa manamuh tu sitangahay a limaky tada malakuwit tu kunysalama nuheny. sisa palatek hankaku taluma satu ciama caaypisikul nayi kulawat pacabay iditakuwan taynisatu kunipatelay nuduma acakulawat madubatu mitengil tu limaky an idaw kusisakamuwan sa caaypatubeli ~awu iyah~ satukiya balucu anmuwangic aca mahidatu kuwayway nuheni sisa madih kaku amala sitangahay alimaky **u sakaydihan** sakusaan matenges musatedep silusatu adihan sakamu satu cimakuida saan patubeli hannaku u "wawaita"
S.PHON: **** u sakajdińßan nakar~…ĺabijan sa mabir~…ĺir~…ĺ kaku miadińß tu nisur~…ĺitan nu mi ¶utadaj mu…ôn…ôŇč kaj a ¶awa i tumunaw misar~…ĺama tu r~…ĺimakj kas…ônusa mabańßar~…ĺ kja r~…ĺusa aku kju mabijar~…ĺaw kinaa ¶awa satu "ńßanj" mańßi ¶akisu saw kjamuaŇči ¶ ! sakamuńßantu numaku ¶inida dunikańßida u sasur~…ĺitan numi ¶utadaj *u sakajdińßan* mabir~…ĺir~…ĺ ¶inida musar~…ĺama tijar~…ĺimakj par~…ĺida satu uńßi ¶a kukar~…ĺar~…ĺuman numisu saw! tar~…ĺsipu tijar~…ĺusa pasakamu ńßantunumaku mańßinj t…ôŇčir~…ĺi ńßaw ... ¶i amaaku a ¶i inaaku sa manamuńß tu sitaŇčańßaj a r~…ĺimakj tada mar~…ĺakuwit tu kunjsar~…ĺama nuńß…ônj. sisa par~…ĺat…ôk ńßankaku tar~…ĺuma satu ¶iama ¶aajpisikur~…ĺ naji kur~…ĺawat pa ¶abaj iditakuwan tajnisatu kunipat…ôr~…ĺaj nuduma a ¶akur~…ĺawat madubatu mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu r~…ĺimakj an idaw kusisakamuwan sa ¶aajpatub…ôr~…ĺi ~awu ijańß~ satukija bar~…ĺu ¶u anmuwaŇči ¶ a ¶a mańßidatu kuwajwaj nuńß…ôni sisa madińß kaku amar~…ĺa sitaŇčańßaj ar~…ĺimakj **u sakajdińßan** sakusaan mat…ôŇč…ôs musat…ôd…ôp sir~…ĺusatu adińßan sakamu satu ¶imakuida saan patub…ôr~…ĺi ńßannaku u "wawaita"
